title: White Block Break
description: Changes the block breaking animation from black to white, making the animation visible on darker blocks! Great for PvP and casual gameplay!
body:
Changes the block breaking animation from the default black to white, making the animation more visible while breaking blocks with darker appearance. Great for PvP and casual gameplay!![Block Break Animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9b7cdecc6a79fd0e20989a34da80a84f316e975.jpeg)

[Please report any bugs to me on discord](https://discord.com/users/761775444516929538)

Made by MrNoodleStroodle
